service.name: DigitalOcean API
service.description_for_ai: Developer-friendly cloud platform. Droplets (VMs), Kubernetes, managed databases, App Platform, Spaces (S3-compatible storage). Simple pricing, great docs. $200 free credit for new users. Use for cloud hosting, VMs, managed services.

auth.cost: $200 free credit for new users. Droplets from $4/month

capabilities.description_for_ai: List all cloud servers (Droplets) in your account with status, IP, specs.

per_page.description: Results per page. Check API docs for maximum allowed.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new cloud server (Droplet) with specified size, OS image, and SSH keys. Returns immediately; server ready in ~30 seconds.

region.description: nyc1, sfo3, lon1, fra1, sgp1, ams3

agent_hints.regions: nyc1/nyc3=New York, sfo3=San Francisco, lon1=London, fra1=Frankfurt, sgp1=Singapore, ams3=Amsterdam, blr1=Bangalore, tor1=Toronto, syd1=Sydney
agent_hints.ssh_keys: Upload SSH public key via POST /v2/account/keys before creating droplet. Pass returned ID in ssh_keys array.
agent_hints.floating_ip: Use reserved IPs (floating IPs) for production — reassign between droplets without DNS changes.
